top_signals.title: Anthropic shuts down Mythos access after sweeping U.S. order
top_signals.summary: Never before has the U.S. government taken such sweeping measures to rein in foreign access to frontier AI models developed by an American company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
